description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages, build and deploy, with a global before_script that runs `yarn install`. In the build stage add a `build html` job that runs `yarn build` and publishes the ./build directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a `deploy` job that overrides the before_script to set up SSH (creating ~/.ssh, writing $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY to id_rsa, chmod 700, starting ssh-agent, adding the key, and adding the host key for 18.191.5.73), then runs `yarn build` and copies ./public/ to ubuntu@18.191.5.73:/var/www/WeBuild.World/build via `scp -r`, and configure it to run only on the develop branch.
